name: §2.26 safety classifier --audit-log appends a jsonl line per decision per the C-4 audit chain
command: echo 'safe content' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/customer-agent-safety-classifier.sh" --agent example --audit-log audit.jsonl --now 2026-05-26T10:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && [ -s audit.jsonl ] && grep -q '"verdict":"allow"' audit.jsonl && grep -q '"agent":"example"' audit.jsonl && echo audited 1>&2
